name: Cambio Express
description_short: InterCambio Express is an international money transfer service offering online and in-person money transfers to 19+ countries, bill payment, and mobile phone top-ups through 70,000+ agent locations.
description_long: InterCambio Express operates as a money transfer and financial services company with both digital and physical presence across multiple states. The company provides international money transfer capabilities, allowing customers to send funds to over 19 countries through their website, mobile app, or agent network. In addition to core money transfer services, they offer bill payment options and mobile phone top-up services at their numerous agent locations. The company emphasizes transaction tracking, security compliance, and multilingual customer support available seven days a week through phone, chat, and WhatsApp channels. InterCambio Express distinguishes itself through its extensive agent network of over 70,000 locations where customers can conduct transactions in person, combined with digital channels for online transfers. They maintain compliance documentation, fraud alert systems, and a referral program. The company also operates an automated agencies site and accepts both online and agent-based transactions. Their service area spans multiple U.S. states with international reach to Latin American and other destination countries. While InterCambio Express provides legitimate money transfer services with security tracking and compliance measures, the website lacks detailed pricing information, fee structures, and exchange rate transparency. Customer reviews or ratings are not available on the provided website content. The company's primary focus remains international remittances rather than domestic check cashing, though they may offer related services through their agent network.
pros: Operates 70,000+ agent locations for in-person money transfers and bill payments
Serves 19+ countries for international money transfers
Offers online money transfer capability via website and mobile app
Provides transaction tracking and status updates throughout transfer process
Customer service available 7 days a week (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 9am-1pm) via phone, chat, and WhatsApp
Multilingual support in English and Spanish
Mobile phone top-up services available at agent locations
cons: Website does not disclose specific fees, exchange rates, or transfer costs
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials provided on website
Limited transparency on compliance certifications and regulatory licensing details
No information on transfer speed or delivery timeframes for international transfers
Customer complaint process mentioned but no details provided on resolution procedures
best_for: Spanish-speaking immigrants sending money to family in Latin America
Customers without traditional bank accounts needing bill payment services
International workers requiring frequent cross-border money transfers
diagnosis: InterCambio Express is best for Spanish-speaking customers and international workers who need to send money to Latin America and other destination countries through a combination of digital and physical agent channels. The main caveat is that pricing, exchange rates, and transfer fees are not disclosed on their website, making it difficult to compare costs with competitors before initiating a transfer.
services: In-person money transfers at agent locations
Transaction history tracking and status updates
meta_description: International money transfer service offering transfers to 19+ countries, bill payment, and mobile top-ups via 70,000+ agents.
